silverblue-x86_64-44.20260627.0\u219244..summary: Spell checker, GNOME Software, vim, DNS utilities, and device-mapper persistent data bug fixes.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260626.0\u219244..summary: Kernel 7.0.13, HP printer drivers, and GNOME Control Center 50.3 bug fixes and enhancements.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260625.0\u219244..summary: Flatpak portal library gains clipboard support and iptstate update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260624.0\u219244..summary: PCI bus utilities bug fix and update to 3.15.0

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260623.0\u219244..summary: Mesa 26.1.3, Bluetooth LE regression fix, rpm-ostree, and GNOME Control Center updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260622.0\u219244..summary: FFmpeg, Python 3, LLVM, SDL2 compatibility, sos, UPnP framework, and Intel Low Power Mode Daemon updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260621.0\u219244..summary: Podman and buildah security fix (CVE-2026-44517), NSS and exFAT filesystem utilities bug fixes, FreeRDP update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260620.0\u219244..summary: Flatpak portal security fix (CVE-2026-55888, CVE-2026-55889) and NFS utilities bug fix.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260619.0\u219244..summary: AWS SDK for Python (boto3, botocore) and S3 Transfer Manager updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260617.0\u219244..summary: util-linux security fixes (CVE-2026-53612, CVE-2026-53613, CVE-2026-53614) and PipeWire bug fix.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260616.0\u219244..summary: Firefox 152.0, NSS 3.124.0, and AMQP client library security fixes; mtr 0.96 and dmidecode 3.7 enhancements.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260615.0\u219244..summary: 7zip security fixes (CVE-2026-48092, CVE-2026-48095, CVE-2026-48101–48104, CVE-2026-48111, CVE-2026-48112), GStreamer bug fixes, and ALSA updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260613.0\u219244..summary: NetworkManager strongSwan VPN fix, WireGuard tools update, KDE Frameworks 6.27, and SELinux policy update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260612.0\u219244..summary: SVG library bug fix, coreutils heap overflow fix, and LLVM libraries update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260611.0\u219244..summary: Kernel security fix (CVE-2025-10263), OpenSSL security fixes (multiple CVEs), firmware updater bug fixes, and SSSD update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260610.0\u219244..summary: Apache HTTP Server security fixes, Kernel 7.0.12, fwupd bug fixes, Flatpak 1.18.0, less and GRUB2 updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260609.0\u219244..summary: Flatpak portal service update with new features.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260607.0\u219244..summary: Audio metadata library slow seeking fix in Matroska files, async DNS library pkgconfig fix.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260606.0\u219244..summary: SELinux policy bug fix and vim update.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260605.0\u219244..summary: Firefox 151.0.3 security fix, libinput local privilege escalation fix, GNOME Software bug fix, and WebKitGTK update.

coreos-x86_64-44.20260523.3.1\u219244.20.summary: Kernel 7.0.11, passt networking fixes, libsolv security fix (CVE-2026-48864), systemd, NetworkManager, btrfs-progs, xfsprogs, and container runtime updates.

coreos-x86_64-44.20260510.3.1\u219244.20.summary: Kernel 7.0.9, dnsmasq security fixes (CVE-2026-2291, CVE-2026-4890–4893, CVE-2026-5172), expat, rsync, glibc, and linux-firmware updates.

coreos-x86_64-44.20260419.3.1\u219244.20.summary: Kernel 7.0.8, jq, curl, nano, sudo, glibc, GnuTLS, OpenSSL, libgcrypt, podman, containerd, and moby-engine security fixes.

coreos-x86_64-43.20260413.3.2\u219244.20.summary: tar security fix (CVE-2025-45582), polkit (CVE-2026-4897), systemd, util-linux (CVE-2026-27456, CWE-190), libtasn1 (CVE-2025-13151), CPU microcode, dnf5, fwupd, and coreutils

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260628.0\u219244..summary: systemd bug fix, fingerprint reader support for Lenovo and Framework laptops, cifs-utils security fix (CVE-2026-12505), and GLib/GVFS updates.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260629.0\u219244..summary: Linux kernel firmware updates for AMD/Intel/NVIDIA GPUs, WiFi, Bluetooth, and Qualcomm platform support.

silverblue-x86_64-44.20260630.0\u219244..summary: Kernel 7.0.14 container escape fix, ipp-usb security fix (CVE-2026-27145), GNOME Shell 50.3, Papers document viewer, and git 2.55.0 bug fixes and updates.
